sources.name: ONS Consumer Prices Index including owner occupiers' housing costs (CPIH)
sources.note: CPIH component indices, 2015=100. Rail fares (COICOP 07.3.1), bus & coach fares (COICOP 07.3.2.1). Monthly, not seasonally adjusted.

sources.name: ONS Retail Prices Index (RPI)
sources.note: RPI component indices, Jan 1987=100. Rail fares (DOCW), bus & coach fares (DOCX). Monthly, not seasonally adjusted. RPI is a legacy measure but provides longer bus fare history than CPIH.

cpihMonthly.label: Transport Fare Indices (CPIH, 2015=100)
cpihMonthly.description: Monthly CPIH component indices for rail fares, bus & coach fares, and all items. 2015=100.

rpiMonthly.label: Transport Fare Indices (RPI, Jan 1987=100)
rpiMonthly.description: Monthly RPI component indices for rail and bus & coach fares. Jan 1987=100. Longer history than CPIH bus series.
